1
What is Paid Traffic?
Paid traffic is the road between the product or service you’re wanting
to sell and the market who may be interested.
”The Big 3 Traffic Platform”
• YouTube = similar to TV
• Facebook = modern day billboard
• Google = similar to Yellow Pages
Organic vs. Paid Traffic
Paid Traffic = a water hose
• You can turn it on and off whenever you please!
• You have control of where it’s going (based off of your business’ needs)
• You have to pay for it, but if you know how to acquire customers at
break even, you win
Organic Traffic = rain
• You aren’t sure when traffic will come or how consistently
• You can’t stop someone else from shutting off the traffic
• You can’t always control where it’s going
• If you have it, be thankful—it’s free! (we’ll learn how to monetize it), if
not, don’t worry
Digital Media Buyers… Who Are we?
A media buyer aggregates and purchases attention. Media buyers
connect consumers with brands that may be of service or of interest to
the consumers.

2
Module 1 Summary Notes
• We are marketers
• We are psychologists
• We are researchers
• We are empaths
• We are humans connecting other humans
• We are communicators
Customer Value Journey
1. Aware
2. Engage
3. Subscribe
4. Convert
5. Excite
6. Ascend
7. Advocate
8. Promote
The role of marketing is to move prospects and customers seamlessly
and subtly through each stage of the “Customer Value Journey.”
The Customer Value Journey consists of multiple marketing campaigns
that work together to move someone from “aware” to “promoter”!
Every business should have at least ONE campaign for every THREE steps
of the Journey…
A market campaign consists of…
• Content (the vehicle)
• Traffic source (the road)
